english_news.title: Iran says it will 'never bow' as Trump rejects peace counteroffer, prolonging Middle East conflict
english_news.summary: Washington has sought to press Beijing to lean on Tehran to reopen the strait, though China's appetite to act as a pressure mechanism remains unclear.

english_news.summary: Tech companies have continued to announce layoffs tied to AI, including recent cuts from Amazon, Meta and Oracle.

chinese_news.title: 氪星晚报 ｜千问与淘宝打通，正式上线AI购物；泡泡玛特将在5月13日举行2026年一季度业务更新电话会
chinese_news.summary:
大公司：

百济神州：第一季度净利润为16.08亿元，同比扭亏为盈

36氪获悉，百济神州发布2026年一季度业绩报告。报告显示，2026年第一季度实现营业收入105.44亿元，同比增长31.0%；归属于上市公司股东的净利润为16.08亿元，上年同期亏损，同比扭亏为盈。业绩变动主要系产品收入增长和费用管理推动了经营效率的提升。

营收确认规则是否存在调整可能？贵州茅台回应

5月11日，贵州茅台召开2025年度及2026年第一季度业绩说明会。会上，针对公司营业收入确认规则以及后续是否存在调整的可能的提问，贵州茅台财务总监、代董事会秘书余思明回应表示，公司严格按照财政部《企业会计准则第14号——收入》要求，在客户取得相关商品控制权时确认收入。其中，自营渠道（含i茅台）以客户确认收货为准，社会经销渠道以经销商签收货物为准。（每经网）

chinese_news.title: 理想整车研发负责人刘立国：说理想不重视技术，是大大的误解
chinese_news.summary:
理想汽车整车电动研发高级副总裁 刘立国

文｜肖漫

编辑｜李勤

走过10年造车历程后，新势力阵营已经普遍从“轻盈”走向“厚重”。尤其是理想汽车，这家公司高呼成为“ 具身智能企业”，但也同时在垒高每一块整车技术能力。

尤其是过去4年，理想汽车几乎重构了底盘系统，联合供应商深度共创了底盘三大项：EMB刹车+800V主动悬架+线控转向。

理想在电池上也在进行自制布局，同时，在自身起家的增程技术上，理想也走到了自研自制阶段

chinese_news.title: 硬氪专访 | 拿到行业最大单笔融资后，余轶南说万里长征才走了第一步
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 邱晓芬

编辑 | 袁斯来

余轶南似乎是那种总能提前踩中风口的冒险家。

他总在追逐更新、更刺激，早期甚至带着些浪漫想象。博士毕业后，他没有如很多同侪一般，进入学术圈，过上平稳安定的一生，而是冲入互联网浪潮，2015年，他又因为余凯一句“我们一起去做 AI 芯片吧？” ，便追随余凯加入地平线创始团队，成为001号员工。此后几年，地平线逐渐成长为国际上自动驾驶领域最受关注的科技公司之一，并于2024年在港交所上市，成为当年港股最大的IPO。

2024年底，他离开地平线，创立「维他动力」，希望把过去十年在自动驾驶领域积累的能力，迁移到消费级机器人上。

员工人均奖金达610万人民币？SK海力士回应

近日有消息称，SK海力士韩国员工人均奖金将达610万人民币。该消息源于国际投行麦格理证券的预测。该投行认为，若SK海力士2027 年营业利润达到447万亿韩元，按营业利润的10%和去年年末约3.5万名员工总数简单计算，分红总规模将达到约44.7万亿韩元，人均可发放奖金约12.9亿韩元，接近610万人民币。5月9日，SK海力士向第一财经记者回应称，由于今年与明年的年度业绩尚未确定，奖金规模也无法预测。该公司同时表示，已在总部层面建立了一套新制度，即以营业利润的10%作为资金来源，每年发放一次绩效奖金。（第一

chinese_news.title: Ozon大中华区总裁Simon Huang：中国卖家，正在涌向俄罗斯｜专访
chinese_news.summary:
编者按：上个月月底，36氪在厦门参加了一场Ozon全球招商启动大会，我们发现现场人山人海。火热的出海和国内经济形成鲜明对比，特别是一组数据吸引了我们注意：尽管俄罗斯电商渗透率在2025年才23%，但是Ozon在2017年至2025年间，实现了91%的年均复合增长率。

这些高增长数据背后，似乎隐藏着比较大的商业机会，但机会究竟是什么？中国卖家如何在AI时代抓住？那边电商处于什么阶段？带着这些疑问，36氪和Ozon大中华区总裁Simon Huang（黄效）进行了一次交流。结论就是：俄语区还有比较长的红利期，中国电商迁移过去有足够的品牌优势、供应链优势，以及运营优势。以下为正文：

过去几年，中国跨境电商最拥挤的地方，是欧美。

以深圳坂田、龙华、华强北为代表的无数跨境卖家，围绕亚马逊、独立站、TikTok Shop和Temu，构建起了一整套成熟的方法论：选品、投流、铺货、品牌化、海外仓、达人营销……。可以说，中国供应链几乎把全球电商卷了个遍。

chinese_news.title: 融资超亿元、割草机器人公司拿下数亿订单，瞄准庭院具身终端｜硬氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜黄楠

编辑｜袁斯来

硬氪获悉，智能庭院机器人公司「长曜创新」近日完成数千万元A+融资，领投方为美的系上市公司盈峰环境，老股东XGROUP持续加注。资金将重点投入技术研发迭代、多SKU量产交付及产品矩阵拓展，持续夯实供应链能力，完善全球化渠道布局。此前，公司已于2025年12月完成A轮融资，半年累计融资金额超亿元。

长曜创新成立于2022年，长期专注户外庭院智能硬件赛道，聚焦无边界割草机器人的研发、设计与制造。公司依托自主技术研发与场景化创新能力，围绕草坪养护场景，构建庭院智能全生态系统。

根据Euromonitor等报告显示，2024年，全球割草机器人销售额占割草机总额的9.1%，处于较低水平。分区域看，欧洲市场存量渗透率达20%-30%，普及率较高，但无边界产品替代空间依然广阔；北美家庭草坪面积大、地形复杂，渗透率不足2%位数，是未来扩容的关键市场。

随着庭院机器人市场持续升温，竞争日趋白热化。面对日益同质化的价格战与功能堆叠，市场分化的背后，是现有产品力难以匹配用户的深层需求。长曜

chinese_news.title: AI开始接管年轻人的「精神自留地」
chinese_news.summary:
撰文｜锅包柚

封面来源｜Unsplash（AI辅助扩图）

五一假期已经结束，但打工人的“节后综合症”并未消退。

面对永远99+的工作群消息，和改不完的PPT，打工人蝈蝈在摸鱼时打开灵光APP里的一个小游戏——“老板被我fire了”。

屏幕里跳出老板最爱的PUA话术：“你们要相信我的眼光”“现在的付出都是值得的”。她疯狂点击，伴随着金币掉落的音效，在赛博世界里体验了一把将老板痛扁、原地暴富的爽感。

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发 | 航空航天电气系统互联组件方案商获数千万融资，细分赛道市占率第一
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 乔钰杰

编辑 | 袁斯来

硬氪获悉，青岛北辰航天航天科技有限公司（下称“北辰航天”）近日完成数千万元天使轮融资，由云启资本独家投资。

北辰航天旗下全资子公司青岛北辰数智科技有限公司成立于2014年，长期深耕航空航天电气系统互联组件研制领域，提供从设计到组装的系统工程解决方案。

电气系统互联是航天器的五大核心组成之一，类似于人体的“神经与血管”，承担电源分配、信号传输、测量控制等关键功能，具有高复杂度与高可靠性要求。随着商业航天、深空探测及低空飞行器的发展，仪器布局与电气系统互联（电缆网）敷设设计及配套电气系统互联组件产品正迎来新的需求增长。

据了解，北辰航天早期即以体制内外协方身份参与航天领域电气系统互联系统设计，深度参与多项运载型号的三维设计工作，技术成熟度行业领先。

经过十余年积累，北辰航天已具备面向航空航天企业的全流程一站式服务能力，从设备构型布局、电气系统互联（电缆网）敷设设计设计，

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Iran close the Strait of Hormuz to commercial traffic for more than 7 consecutive days before July 31, 2026?

market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Trump-Iran escalation is priced into oil but strait closure binary is underexplored; current conflict escalation rhetoric justified by geopolitical premium.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC/BBC: Trump 'totally unacceptable' on Iran response, Iran demands lifting naval blockade and Strait sovereignty; shipping reroute impact on whales suggests sustained tension.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the Fed cut the federal funds rate below 4.00% by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Federal Reserve FOMC meeting decision announcements

market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: April home sales barely moved, mortgage rates shot higher; Hassett AI job impact claims vs. Amazon/Meta/Oracle cuts create hawkish-dovish tension.

market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk: Ripple Prime $200M raise, banking stablecoin yield escalation, SUI 25% weekend surge; Cointelegraph: crypto/AI 2026 midterm campaign risk

market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: FDA Emergency Use Authorization list or press release

market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: Hantavirus cruise outbreak sparks pharma/biotech surge on vaccine reports; BBC: US and French nationals test positive, isolating in Nebraska/Paris.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Tesla stock close above $250 by August 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Burry's parabolic rejection signals Tesla as canonical overvalued AI/EV proxy; housing weakness and consumer uncertainty (Iran war impact noted in April sales data) risk EV demand; no major Tesla news in today's flow but sentiment backdrop is ripe.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: Michael Burry warns on parabolic stocks, April home sales disappoint (EV sales proxy), geopolitical uncertainty weighs on consumers; housing weakness historically drags discretionary spending including vehicles.

investment_theses.thesis: Geopolitical Iran premium in oil will persist through Q3 2026, supporting DXY strength and compressing risk appetite for growth equities; long crude, short Russell 2000.
supporting_signals: CNBC/BBC: Trump rejects Iran peace counteroffer, Iran demands Strait sovereignty and naval blockade lifting—no near-term resolution path.
CNBC: April home sales disappoint as Iran war uncertainty weighs on consumers, mortgage rates spike—geopolitical tail risk live in macro.
BBC: Shipping reroutes around Cape of Good Hope sustained since 2023; mid-East conflict not de-escalating.
investment_theses.counter_view: Diplomatic surprise breakthrough (US-Iran or Saudi mediation) could collapse oil risk premium in days; Trump incentive to stabilize markets ahead of 2026 midterms may accelerate dealmaking.
investment_theses.expression: Long crude oil (CL futures or USO ETF); long USD (DXY or 3x bull ETN); short Russell 2000 (IWM or 2x bear; or short individual small-cap growth exposed to consumer discretionary and EV).

investment_theses.thesis: Institutional crypto inflows (Ripple $200M, Circle $3B Arc raise, Strategy BTC, Tom Lee continuation) are outpacing valuation concerns; Bitcoin and Ethereum will re-test cycle highs into Q3 as stablecoin yield competition drives deposits.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: Ripple raises $200M from Neuberger Berman for Prime; Circle Arc $222M presale at $3B valuation.
CoinDesk: Strategy buys $43M BTC, Tom Lee's Bitmine slows ETH but continues; banking groups escalate stablecoin yield fight.
Cointelegraph: Augustus OCC approval for AI/stablecoin bank signals regulatory runway; Arc token presale momentum.
investment_theses.counter_view: Burry's parabolic warning and tech layoff narrative (Amazon, Meta, Oracle) could trigger crypto VC rotation; regulatory headwinds from 2026 midterm 'dirty words' campaign.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC perpetuals or spot accumulation (target $65k+); long ETH (target $3,200+); long stablecoin yield plays (Circle Arc if private; USDC on Aave/Curve for yield).

investment_theses.thesis: Chipset competition from local AI inference (Hacker News: M4, local models norm) will compress NVIDIA valuation multiple over next 6 months; Burry's parabolic warning is justified; shift long-term from NVDA to diversified semiconductors (MU, AMD, ASML).
supporting_signals: Hacker News (top 5 discussions): Local AI needs to be norm, M4 24GB performance, AI coding agents reduce maintenance—inference commoditizing.
CNBC: Burry says reduce parabolic positions almost entirely; AI hype vs. real job impact (Hassett claims no job losses, but Amazon/Meta/Oracle cutting).
CoinDesk: Cerebras IPO raise $4.8B—competing GPU/AI chip narrative, not monopoly.
investment_theses.counter_view: NVIDIA's training moat (H100/H200) and cloud capex cycle remain strong; local inference is inference, not training; Cerebras success unproven.
investment_theses.expression: Short NVDA (via put spreads or 3x inverse leveraged ETN); long MU (memory cycle), AMD, or semiconductor sector ETF (SMH) with underweight NVDA.

investment_theses.thesis: Housing market collapse signal (April sales disappoint, rates spike, geopolitical uncertainty) will force Fed to cut rates by Q4 2026; bonds (TLT long-duration) will outperform equities into year-end.
supporting_signals: CNBC: April home sales barely moved; mortgage rates shot higher; Iran war uncertainty weighs on consumer confidence.
CNBC/BBC: Geopolitical tail risk (Iran, Trump escalation) will persist, suppressing discretionary spending and housing demand.
Implied: Housing weakness is macro canary—precursor to labor softening and forced Fed pivot.
investment_theses.counter_view: Fed stays hawkish through 2026 midterms to control inflation narrative; housing weakness is transitory (rate cycle already priced in); fiscal stimulus could re-ignite growth.
investment_theses.expression: Long long-duration Treasury bonds (TLT, LongETF, or 30Y bond futures); long gold (GLD) as inflation hedge; short 2Y/10Y curve steepener if rates stay sticky.

investment_theses.thesis: Stablecoin yield and institutional USDC adoption (Circle Arc, banking escalation) will compress volatility and shift crypto narrative from speculation to yield; USDC yield on Layer 2s (Aave, Curve, Pendle) becomes primary risk-on allocation for macro hedge funds.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: Banking groups escalate stablecoin yield fight; Ripple $200M for Prime platform expansion.
CoinDesk: Circle Arc $222M raise signals institutional confidence in USDC ecosystem; Corpay/BVNK integrate stablecoin wallets into corporate payments.
Cointelegraph: Augustus OCC approval for stablecoin bank—regulatory green light for yield products.
investment_theses.counter_view: USDC yield remains below money market rates in real terms; regulatory clampdown on yield farming or stablecoin custody could collapse adoption; macro rates stay high, killing carry appeal.
investment_theses.expression: Long USDC (buy and deposit on Aave/Curve for 4–6% yield); position size in USDC stablecoin ETPs (if available); long Pendle's USDC fixed-yield tranche; short USD money market funds as arb (if yield spreads widen sufficiently).
